use_cases: Switching between languages in a web application header or navigation bar
Setting user locale preference during onboarding or in account settings
Enabling internationalization for multi-region e-commerce platforms
Allowing content creators to select their preferred interface language
Providing language selection for dashboard or SaaS product users
ai_summary: A language selector dropdown component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur effects, flag emojis for visual language identification, and smooth click-to-reveal dropdown behavior. Supports 13 languages with click-outside detection for dismissing, making it ideal for internationalized web applications requiring quick locale switching.
